overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded warrior exploring a grand marble temple terrace overlooking ancient Alexandria during golden hour. The character transitions from a columned interior walkway to an open ceremonial overlook with panoramic city views, then descends a monumental staircase toward the streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered ceremonial colonnade with towering marble columns

events.description: character exits the covered colonnade into the open terrace with city views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grand marble colonnade toward the bright terrace exit

entered.detail: tall cylindrical marble columns supporting the roof structure
flowing white fabric curtains hanging between columns
potted palm plants with spiky fronds in golden planters
polished white marble flooring with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand ceremonial colonnade with massive marble columns and flowing white fabrics. The space is sheltered and diffusely lit, with decorative plants lining the walkway. At around 8 seconds, the character emerges from the covered walkway into bright golden-hour sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ceremonial terrace overlooking ancient city and harbor

events.description: character pauses at terrace edge to observe the panoramic city view
character turns right and walks along the terrace perimeter

agents.ego_description: walking around the terrace perimeter, pausing to admire the lighthouse and cityscape, then continuing along the edge

entered.detail: tall ancient lighthouse visible in the distance across the city
panoramic view of ancient alexandria with terracotta rooftops and domes
large lion pelt rug laid out on the marble floor with head intact
golden metal braziers with burning contents
colorful flower petals strewn across the marble terrace floor

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a sunlit ceremonial terrace with breathtaking views of ancient Alexandria and the famous Lighthouse. The marble floor is scattered with flower petals and adorned with a lion skin rug. The character explores the perimeter, taking in the golden-hour vistas before turning toward a grand staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental marble staircase descending to lower courtyard

events.description: character begins descending the wide marble staircase

agents.ego_description: walking down the grand marble staircase, passing stone statues and other civilians

notable_agents.action: civilian sitting on the staircase edge resting
civilian walking up the stairs in blue tunic

entered.detail: wide ceremonial stairs with carved marble steps descending to the city
classical stone statues on pedestals flanking the staircase
open plaza area at the bottom of the stairs with palm trees

segments.scene_description: The character descends a monumental marble staircase flanked by classical statues, moving from the elevated terrace toward the city streets below. Other civilians appear on the stairs - one resting on the steps, another walking upward. The view of the lighthouse fades as the character descends, with the city skyline shifting to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered marble colonnade out onto a sun-drenched terrace and down into the heart of ancient Alexandria. It begins within a grand ceremonial walkway of massive columns and flowing white fabrics, where the lighting is soft and diffuse. As the character emerges from the covered area, the scene opens into the brilliant gold of the late afternoon sun, revealing a wide terrace adorned with flower petals and a lion skin rug overlooking the city and its distant lighthouse. The camera then follows the character as they turn away from the panoramic vistas to descend a monumental marble staircase flanked by classical statues. Finally, the view of the lighthouse fades as the character moves past resting civilians, shifting the perspective toward the bustling city streets below.
